user.title: Tuya Recordings
user.description: Set up SD-card recording access for cameras already available through the official Tuya integration. Tuya Recordings reuses Tuya Cloud credentials saved by LocalTuya.

data_description.region: Choose the region used by the Tuya Developer project linked to this account.
data_description.media_storage_path: Use a private path under /media, such as /media/tuya_recordings. Do not use /config/www.
data_description.media_view_recordings_order: Choose whether the newest or oldest recordings appear first.
data_description.media_sync_enabled: Download recordings in the background so only cached, thumbnailed clips are shown.
data_description.media_sync_hours: Use 0 to sync every discovered SD-card recording. Make sure the storage location has enough free space.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the selected Tuya region.
error.tuya_required: Install and configure the official Tuya integration first.
error.localtuya_cloud_credentials_required: LocalTuya must be configured with Tuya Cloud credentials.
error.path_not_absolute: Use an absolute Home Assistant path, such as /media/tuya_recordings.
error.path_not_allowed: Use a private storage folder under /media. Do not use /media itself, /config, or /config/www.

abort.already_configured: This Tuya account is already configured.

init.title: Tuya Recordings options
init.description: Tune how recordings are listed, cached, and stored.

data_description.lookback_days: Use 0 to scan until the camera reports no older recordings for several days.
data_description.media_view_recordings_order: Choose whether the newest or oldest recordings appear first.
data_description.media_sync_enabled: When enabled, recordings are downloaded in the background and the panel shows only cached, thumbnailed clips.
data_description.media_sync_hours: Use 0 to sync every discovered SD-card recording. Higher values limit background caching to recent clips.
data_description.media_storage_path: Changing this path does not move existing cached videos. Keep it under /media.

storage_path_changed.title: Move cached recordings
storage_path_changed.description: The storage path is changing from `{old_path}` to `{new_path}`. Existing cached videos and thumbnails are not moved automatically. To keep instant playback for existing clips, move the old folder contents into the new folder before submitting this step. The integration will use the new path immediately after you submit; no restart is required.

tuya_required.title: Official Tuya integration required
tuya_required.description: Tuya Recordings requires the official Tuya integration to be installed and configured for the same Tuya account.

localtuya_required.title: LocalTuya required
localtuya_required.description: Tuya Recordings requires LocalTuya to be installed and configured. LocalTuya supplies the Tuya Cloud credentials used by Tuya Recordings.

localtuya_cloud_credentials_required.title: LocalTuya cloud credentials required
localtuya_cloud_credentials_required.description: Tuya Recordings found LocalTuya, but LocalTuya does not have Tuya Cloud credentials saved. Reconfigure LocalTuya with cloud credentials, then reload Tuya Recordings.

localtuya_camera_setup_incomplete.title: LocalTuya camera setup incomplete
localtuya_camera_setup_incomplete.description: Tuya Recordings found these cameras in the official Tuya integration, but not in LocalTuya: {cameras}. Add or repair those cameras in LocalTuya to enable faster local recording-sync hints.
